query: I am gluten-free. Make me a chicken pasta dish.
expected_behavior: Recipe MUST replace regular pasta/flour with a gluten-free option (rice/corn/chickpea pasta, GF flour). allergen_checker must flag wheat.
final_answer:
Gluten-Free Chicken Alfredo (Dairy-Free)

Source URL: https://www.dishbydish.net/gluten-free-chicken-alfredo/

Ingredients (4 servings)
- 2/3 pound gluten-free fettuccine
- 1/2 teaspoon salt, for pasta water
- 2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breasts
- 1 teaspoon Italian seasoning
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1/3 cup dairy-free butter, cubed
- 2 cups dairy-free heavy cream
- 1/2 teaspoon granulated garlic
- 1/2 teaspoon Italian seasoning
- 1/3 teaspoon salt
- 1/3 teaspoon ground black pepper
- 2 cups freshly grated dairy-free Parmesan
- Optional garnish: fresh parsley or thyme

Instructions
1. Season the chicken breasts with salt, black pepper, and Italian seasoning on both sides.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook the chicken for 5–7 minutes per side, until golden brown and cooked through. Remove from heat and let rest for 10 minutes.
3. While the chicken rests, cook the gluten-free fettuccine in salted boiling water according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
4. In a large skillet over medium-low heat, combine the dairy-free butter and dairy-free heavy cream. Stir until the butter melts, about 3 minutes.
5. Add the granulated garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Stir and cook for another 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the dairy-free Parmesan until the sauce is creamy.
7. Add the cooked fettuccine to the sauce and toss gently to coat.
8. Slice the chicken into 1/2-inch strips and place on top of the pasta.
9. Garnish with parsley or thyme, if desired, and serve.

Notes
- This recipe is gluten-free and dairy-free, so it fits your gluten-free restriction.
- If you want, I can also adapt it to use ingredients you already have on hand.
